# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

apiVersion: "2024-03-01"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
metadata:
  description: "ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running web application - Phase 1 deployment with default disk settings"

parameters:
  projectName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "webapp"
    metadata:
      description: "Project name used for resource naming"
    minLength: 2
    maxLength: 20

  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "dev"
    allowedValues:
      - "dev"
      - "staging"
      - "prod"
    metadata:
      description: "Deployment environment"

  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: "Azure region for all resources"

  vmCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 10
    metadata:
      description: "Number of VMs to deploy"

  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Standard_D2s_v3"
    allowedValues:
      - "Standard_B2s"
      - "Standard_D2s_v3"
      - "Standard_D4s_v3"
      - "Standard_D8s_v3"
    metadata:
      description: "Size of the virtual machines"

  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Admin username for the VMs"
    minLength: 1

  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: "Admin password for the VMs"
    minLength: 12

  osDiskSizeGB:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 128
    allowedValues:
      - 64
      - 128
      - 256
    metadata:
      description: "OS disk size in GB"

  dataDiskSizeGB:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 256
    allowedValues:
      - 128
      - 256
      - 512
      - 1024
    metadata:
      description: "Data disk size in GB"

  dataDiskCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 1
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 4
    metadata:
      description: "Number of data disks per VM"

  osImagePublisher:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Canonical"
    metadata:
      description: "OS image publisher"

  osImageOffer:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy"
    metadata:
      description: "OS image offer"

  osImageSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "22_04-lts-gen2"
    metadata:
      description: "OS image SKU"

  osImageVersion:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "latest"
    metadata:
      description: "OS image version"

  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.0.0/16"
    metadata:
      description: "Virtual network address prefix"

  subnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.1.0/24"
    metadata:
      description: "Subnet address prefix"

  enableAcceleratedNetworking:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: "Enable accelerated networking on NICs"

  # NOTE: Phase 2 parameters placeholder for disk encryption
  # enableDiskEncryption:
  #   type: bool
  #   defaultValue: false
  # keyVaultName:
  #   type: string
  # keyVaultResourceGroup:
  #   type: string
  # diskEncryptionKeyUrl:
  #   type: string

variables:
  namingPrefix: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'))]"
  vnetName: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-vnet')]"
  subnetName: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-subnet-web')]"
  nsgName: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-nsg-web')]"
  lbName: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-lb')]"
  lbPublicIpName: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-lb-pip')]"
  availabilitySetName: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-avset')]"
  diagnosticsStorageName: "[concat(replace(variables('namingPrefix'), '-', ''), 'diag')]"
  lbFrontendName: "LoadBalancerFrontEnd"
  lbBackendPoolName: "LoadBalancerBackEndPool"
  lbProbeName: "httpHealthProbe"
  lbProbeNameHttps: "httpsHealthProbe"

resources:
  # Diagnostics Storage Account
  - type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[variables('diagnosticsStorageName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: "StorageV2"
    sku:
      name: "Standard_LRS"
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: "TLS1_2"
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
    tags:
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      phase: "1"

  # Network Security Group
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "Allow-HTTP-Inbound"
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "Allow HTTP traffic from load balancer"

        - name: "Allow-HTTPS-Inbound"
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "Allow HTTPS traffic from load balancer"

        - name: "Allow-SSH-Inbound"
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "22"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "Allow SSH for administration - restrict source IP in production"

        - name: "Deny-All-Other-Inbound"
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Deny"
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "Deny all other inbound traffic"
    tags:
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"

  # Virtual Network
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    tags:
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"

  # Load Balancer Public IP
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('lbPublicIpName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard"
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: "Static"
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-web')]"
    tags:
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"

  # Load Balancer
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('lbName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('lbPublicIpName'))]"
    properties:
      frontendIPConfigurations:
        - name: "[variables('lbFrontendName')]"
          properties:
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('lbPublicIpName'))]"
      backendAddressPools:
        - name: "[variables('lbBackendPoolName')]"
      loadBalancingRules:
        - name: "HTTP-Rule"
          properties:
            frontendIPConfiguration:
              id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/frontendIPConfigurations/', variables('lbFrontendName'))]"
            backendAddressPool:
              id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/backendAddressPools/', variables('lbBackendPoolName'))]"
            probe:
              id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/probes/', variables('lbProbeName'))]"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            frontendPort: 80
            backendPort: 80
            enableFloatingIP: false
            idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4
            loadDistribution: "Default"
            disableOutboundSnat: true

        - name: "HTTPS-Rule"
          properties:
            frontendIPConfiguration:
              id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/frontendIPConfigurations/', variables('lbFrontendName'))]"
            backendAddressPool:
              id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/backendAddressPools/', variables('lbBackendPoolName'))]"
            probe:
              id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/probes/', variables('lbProbeNameHttps'))]"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            frontendPort: 443
            backendPort: 443
            enableFloatingIP: false
            idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4
            loadDistribution: "Default"
            disableOutboundSnat: true

      probes:
        - name: "[variables('lbProbeName')]"
          properties:
            protocol: "Http"
            port: 80
            requestPath: "/health"
            intervalInSeconds: 15
            numberOfProbes: 2
            probeThreshold: 1

        - name: "[variables('lbProbeNameHttps')]"
          properties:
            protocol: "Tcp"
            port: 443
            intervalInSeconds: 15
            numberOfProbes: 2
            probeThreshold: 1

      outboundRules:
        - name: "OutboundRule"
          properties:
            frontendIPConfigurations:
              - id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/frontendIPConfigurations/', variables('lbFrontendName'))]"
            backendAddressPool:
              id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/backendAddressPools/', variables('lbBackendPoolName'))]"
            protocol: "All"
            enableTcpReset: true
            idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4
            allocatedOutboundPorts: 1024
    tags:
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"

  # Availability Set
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets"
    apiVersion: "2024-03-01"
    name: "[variables('availabilitySetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Aligned"
    properties:
      platformFaultDomainCount: 2
      platformUpdateDomainCount: 5
    tags:
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"

  # Network Interfaces (one per VM)
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-nic-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName'))]"
    copy:
      name: "nicLoop"
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: "ipconfig1"
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
            loadBalancerBackendAddressPools:
              - id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('lbName')), '/backendAddressPools/', variables('lbBackendPoolName'))]"
      enableAcceleratedNetworking: "[parameters('enableAcceleratedNetworking')]"
    tags:
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"

  # Virtual Machines
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
    apiVersion: "2024-03-01"
    name: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-nic-', copyIndex(1)))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', variables('availabilitySetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('diagnosticsStorageName'))]"
    copy:
      name: "vmLoop"
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
    properties:
      availabilitySet:
        id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', variables('availabilitySetName'))]"
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"

      osProfile:
        computerName: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        linuxConfiguration:
          disablePasswordAuthentication: false
          provisionVMAgent: true
          patchSettings:
            patchMode: "AutomaticByPlatform"
            automaticByPlatformSettings:
              rebootSetting: "IfRequired"

      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "[parameters('osImagePublisher')]"
          offer: "[parameters('osImageOffer')]"
          sku: "[parameters('osImageSku')]"
          version: "[parameters('osImageVersion')]"

        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(variables('namingPrefix'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-osdisk
